hero.badge: Available for freelance and full-time roles
hero.name: Boeun Narong
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.intro: I design and build reliable web products with clean frontend experiences, scalable backend architecture, and practical business impact.
hero.profileSummary: Focused on building scalable full-stack products with clean UI, stable backend systems, and practical business value.

about.title: About Me
about.summary1: I am a full stack developer focused on delivering maintainable and high-performance applications for real business workflows.
about.summary2: My approach combines clean code, reusable component architecture, and strong attention to user experience. From frontend polish to backend reliability, I build products that are production-ready and easy to scale.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: A practical stack for shipping modern applications from UI to database.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected projects that highlight product thinking, engineering quality, and polished user interfaces.

erpPortal.title: Enterprise ERP Portal
erpPortal.description: A role-based internal portal for operations, finance, and reporting with secure permissions and dynamic dashboard modules.

bookingPlatform.title: Service Booking Platform
bookingPlatform.description: A booking workflow with real-time availability, payment tracking, and responsive customer-facing pages for fast conversion.

commerceDashboard.title: E-commerce Admin Dashboard
commerceDashboard.description: A management dashboard for products, orders, and customer analytics with streamlined operations and clean visual hierarchy.

analyticsSuite.title: Business Analytics Suite
analyticsSuite.description: A KPI and reporting platform that turns operational data into actionable insights with chart-rich and export-friendly views.

finalEtec.title: Clothing E-commerce Mobile App
finalEtec.description: A Flutter mobile application connected with Firebase for authentication, real-time data handling, and streamlined student project workflows. Intergrated with real payment gateway for seamless transactions.

cafePosBakong.title: Cafe POS System with Bakong Payment
cafePosBakong.description: A cafe point-of-sale system for orders, table management, and receipts with integrated Bakong KHQR payment support for fast and secure cashless checkout.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let us discuss your project requirements and build something meaningful together.
contact.socialSubtitle: Connect with me on these platforms for updates, collaborations, and new opportunities.
